children.heading: Exemption from legal process
children.label: a Exemption from legal process
children.text: Except as provided in subsections (b), (c), and (e), none of the moneys mentioned in this subchapter shall be assignable either in law or equity, or be subject to execution, levy, attachment, garnishment, or other legal process, except as otherwise may be provided by Federal laws.

children.heading: Payment to former spouses under court order or spousal agreement
children.label: b Payment to former spouses under court order or spousal agreement

children.text: any right of the former spouse to any annuity under in connection with any retirement or disability annuity of the participant, and the amount of any such annuity;section 2032(a) of this title
any right of the former spouse of a participant or retired participant to a survivor annuity under section 2032(b) or 2032(c) of this title, and the amount of any such annuity; and
any right of the former spouse of a former participant to any payment of a lump-sum credit under , and the amount of any such payment;section 2071(b) of this title

children.heading: Other payments under court orders
children.label: c Other payments under court orders
children.text: Payments under this subchapter that would otherwise be made to a participant, former participant, or retired participant based upon that participant’s service shall be paid, in whole or in part, by the Director to another individual if and to the extent expressly provided for in the terms of any court decree of divorce, annulment, or legal separation, or the terms of any court order or court-approved property settlement agreement incident to any court decree of divorce, annulment, or legal separation.

children.heading: Prospective payments; bar to recovery
children.label: d Prospective payments; bar to recovery

children.text: Subsections (b) and (c) apply only to payments made under this subchapter for periods beginning after the date of receipt by the Director of written notice of such decree, order, or agreement and such additional information and documentation as the Director may require.
Any payment under subsection (b) or (c) to an individual bars recovery by any other individual.

children.heading: Allotments
children.label: e Allotments
children.text: An individual entitled to an annuity from the fund may make allotments or assignments of amounts from such annuity for such purposes as the Director considers appropriate.
